title: Create: Halitosis
description: Fan processing recipes with an ender dragon head
body:
A small Create addon that permits "enderising" various items by bulk processing them with dragon breath from an encased fan.  If you have [Create: Dreams and Desires](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-dreams-and-desires), this functionality is already included, and this mod is not needed.  New recipes can be added via datapacks.  The following conversions exist in the base mod:

- Apple->Chorus Fruit
- Blaze Rod->End Rod
- Cobblestone->End Stone
- Glass Bottle->Dragon's Breath
- Prismarine Crystals->Ender Pearl
- Stone Bricks (all variants)->End Stone Bricks

Additionally, if you have the quark mod installed, the following recipes are added:

- Prismarine->Myalite
- Dark Prismarine->Dusky Myalite
- Any Corundum Crystal Block->Myalite Crystal
